filter_reason: Primary post for a new OpenAI agent product - major-player news with direct orchestration relevance.
summary: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Work, an agent that takes actions across a user's apps and files, can stay on a project for hours, and turns a stated goal into finished work rather than just chat replies. It's OpenAI's clearest move yet toward long-running, autonomous workplace agents. For anyone tracking agent orchestration, this is a production-scale test of long-horizon task execution and cross-app tool use.
title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
excerpt: ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.
